hero.concept2Body: : A Seamless world shaped by people with tenacity

background.p1: Tenacities was founded in March 2022 with Metaverse as its goal.
background.p2: Since I was young, I wanted to build a single world. A business, a company itself, is also one world, so I naturally walked the path of entrepreneurship.
background.p3: While repeating attempts and failures, experience and growth, the keyword Metaverse came to me. I did not know it deeply at first, but it felt like a destined keyword. Metaverse itself is one world.
background.p4: Though it may sound old-fashioned, I view the world through the lens of self-cultivation, family order, governance, and peace under heaven.
background.p5: Just as I am one world, my family is one world, and beyond that, a company is also one world.
background.p6: But I have no country to rule and no ambition to conquer all under heaven.
background.p7: So, with my own adaptation — Self-cultivation, Family, Company, Love for the World — I continue expanding my awareness and reach.

philosophy.note: ※ Tenacities aims for Metaverse, but our view may differ significantly from the Metaverse discussed in academia.

topic1.title: 1️⃣ Misunderstandings about Metaverse and its essence
topic1.p1: Many people confuse Metaverse, 3D World, and virtual reality. Tenacities also started that way.
topic1.p2: After repeated exploration, we interpreted Seamless world as the essence of Metaverse.

topic2.title: 2️⃣ What Seamless world means
topic2.p1: The self exists as a continuous being, in a Seamless state, wherever and whenever.
topic2.p2: When I graduate from elementary school and enter middle school, I cannot function as a member there until my profile is registered and a student number is issued. I am Seamless, but the World is not Seamless because of centralized management systems.
topic2.p3: The same is true when moving from Korea to the U.S. Without registration in that system, I cannot exist as a member of that society.
topic2.p4: The inseparable relation between Metaverse and decentralization is not merely political. It reflects human nature that seeks Seamless survival. That is why Coin, NFT, and Block chain are discussed together.

topic3.title: 3️⃣ Tenacities' Seamless World
topic3.p1: For building a Seamless world, Tenacities defines the three essential foundations as housing, food, and labor.
topic3.p2: Even in a present and future where many jobs are replaced by AI, if people can sustain the essence of labor and have housing and food ecosystems that support it, they can continue their will to live.
topic3.p3: Wherever in the world we go, even if humanity migrates to Mars, we aim to build a Seamless world where self-sufficiency in these three dimensions is possible.

topic4.title: 4️⃣ Tenacities and Seamless World
topic4.p1: Tenacities aspires to a world where people with will are given more opportunities.
topic4.p2: Tenacities is a collective of people with the will to build better lives.
topic4.p3: We aim for a Metaverse where people with will can live freely.

page202208.title: 2022.08. Social Metaverse Toany 론칭
page202208.item1: Metaverse 내부에서 F&B 배달을 위한 서비스 연동.
page202208.item2: Toany를 통해 땡겨요 F&B 주문 시 NFT good 제공
page202208.item3: 3개 투자사(1 ac, 2 vc)사전신청 유저 10인 트위치 스트리머 1인 인베스트뉴스 기자 1인 참석
page202208.item6: 메타버스 단체 소개팅 남성 4인, 여성 4인 참가
page202208.item8: 우리집 포트럭 파티 남성 3팀, 남녀 1인 참가(2인 1팀)
page202208.item9: 대규모 상시 접속 인원이 보장되지 않으면 즐길 콘텐츠가 없다.
page202208.item10: 즐길 콘텐츠가 없으면 상시 접속할 이유가 없다.

page202306.item2: 출시는 길어지는데 개발자, 디자이너 등을 유지할 수 없는 관계로 출시 포기

detail.title: CI — Brand Identity System
detail.primaryColorDescription: ‘열정’을 상징하되, 단기 집중형 감정이 아닌 장기간에 걸친 ‘의지’를 드러내기 위해 채도를 조정하고 깊이를 더한 색으로 정의됩니다.
detail.emblemItem1: TENACITIES: Abstractly visualizes each letter of the Tenacities name.
detail.emblemItem2: From seed to fruit: The lower semicircle (seed), middle vine (stem), and upper semicircle (fruit) symbolize continuity in the value of 修身 齊家 治社 愛天下.
detail.emblemItem3: Steady burning flame: Through the torch grip and flame form, it represents sustained Tenacity over rapid short-term success.
detail.emblemItem4: Two joined hands: Views customers and team members as equal ecosystem participants, aiming for cyclical co-growth.
detail.emblemItem5: Other symbols: Expresses balance of responsibility and authority through symmetric butterfly-wing and top-bottom symmetry motifs.
detail.footer: CI section designed as a structured brand identity area.
